name: Champions Indoor Golf - Norton
about: Champions Indoor Golf operates a network of simulator venues across Massachusetts, offering golfers the opportunity to play on world's top courses in a climate-controlled environment. The facilities feature immersive simulator bays equipped with launch monitor technology, allowing for year-round practice, play, and competition. Venues offer a range of services including hourly bay rentals, private lessons, club fittings, and participation in organized leagues and tournaments.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to a wide variety of world-class golf courses via simulation technology
Ability to practice and play golf year-round regardless of weather conditions
Opportunities to join competitive leagues like the Champions Cup

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on website
No alcohol service mentioned on website

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology used for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted at Champions Indoor Golf locations.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes on a simulator typically takes approximately 2-3 hours, depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and offers a welcoming environment for families and junior golfers.
